funfacts.sentence: Prince-Osei Owusu is Montreal's top scorer with 6 goals. Hugo Cuypers has scored 11 times for Chicago Fire.
Chicago Fire have lost none of their last 4 away matches.
Montreal have won 4 home matches in a row.
When playing at home, New England have not lost to Minnesota in their last 3 encounters.
New England's home record this season: 6-0-0.
Carles Gil is New England's top scorer with 4 goals. Kelvin Yeboah has scored 7 times for Minnesota.
